title: desmodium setigerum
intro: Desmodium setigerum, also known as finger grass, is a perennial legume plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Desmodium setigerum include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery. Desmodium setigerum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, and it is also used in the production of herbal supplements and traditional remedies.
